Module com.lulow.justtype
Package com.lulow.justtype.view

Class GameView

java.lang.Object
com.lulow.justtype.view.GameView
public class GameView extends Object
Manages all visual output for the main game screen. Responsible for rendering words character by character, colorizing input, updating the HUD (level and timer), displaying feedback messages, running entrance animations, and managing particle effects.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameView(javafx.scene.layout.HBox wordDisplay, javafx.scene.control.Label levelLabel, javafx.scene.control.Label timerLabel, javafx.scene.layout.StackPane timerPane, javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane rootPane, javafx.scene.layout.HBox timerPill)
    Creates the game view, initializing the timer arc, background gradient, ash emitter, and the floating feedback label.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Constructor Details

    • GameView

      public GameView(javafx.scene.layout.HBox wordDisplay, javafx.scene.control.Label levelLabel, javafx.scene.control.Label timerLabel, javafx.scene.layout.StackPane timerPane, javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane rootPane, javafx.scene.layout.HBox timerPill)
      Creates the game view, initializing the timer arc, background gradient, ash emitter, and the floating feedback label.
      Parameters:
      wordDisplay - the HBox where character labels are rendered
      levelLabel - the label displaying the current level
      timerLabel - the label displaying the remaining seconds
      timerPane - the StackPane containing the timer label and arc
      rootPane - the root AnchorPane of the game scene
      timerPill - the HBox styled as the timer pill container

  • Method Details

    • setupAnimations

      public void setupAnimations(javafx.scene.control.TextField inputField, javafx.scene.control.Button submitButton, javafx.scene.control.Button resetButton)
      Creates press animations and wires mouse-press handlers for interactive controls.
      Parameters:
      inputField - the text input field
      submitButton - the submit answer button
      resetButton - the reset/restart button

    • playInputAnimation

      public void playInputAnimation()
      Plays the press animation on the input field.

    • playEntranceAnimations

      public void playEntranceAnimations()
      Plays the entrance animations for the timer pill, word display, input field, and submit button. Called once when a new game starts.

    • shakeWordDisplay

      public void shakeWordDisplay()
      Plays a horizontal shake animation on the word display to signal a wrong answer.

    • initTimer

      public void initTimer(int totalSeconds)
      Initializes the timer arc for a new level.
      Parameters:
      totalSeconds - the total countdown seconds for this level

    • renderWord

      public void renderWord(char[] chars, int level)
      Renders the current word as individual character labels inside the word display HBox. Applies a smaller font for EXPERT-tier words and plays a pop animation.
      Parameters:
      chars - the character array of the word to display
      level - the current level, used to determine font size

    • colorizeChars

      public void colorizeChars(String typed, String target)
      Colors each character label based on whether the typed character matches the expected character at the same position.
      Parameters:
      typed - the text currently in the input field
      target - the correct word

    • whitenChars

      public void whitenChars()
      Sets all character labels to white, used when transitioning away from the game screen.

    • getWordDisplay

      public javafx.scene.layout.HBox getWordDisplay()
      Returns the word display HBox, used when injecting it into result screens.
      Returns:
      the word display container

    • showFeedback

      public void showFeedback(boolean isSuccess)
      Shows a brief feedback message. If a feedback animation is already running, the new message is queued and shown immediately after.
      Parameters:
      isSuccess - true for a correct-answer message, false for incorrect

    • hideFeedback

      public void hideFeedback()
      Immediately hides the feedback label and clears any pending message.

    • isCritical

      public boolean isCritical(int secondsLeft)
      Returns whether the given time is at or below the critical threshold.
      Parameters:
      secondsLeft - the current countdown value
      Returns:
      true if the timer is in its critical phase

    • updateHUD

      public void updateHUD(int level, int secondsLeft)
      Updates the level label, timer label, timer arc, and background gradient. Applies critical styling and plays a pulse animation when time is low.
      Parameters:
      level - the current game level
      secondsLeft - the remaining seconds for this level

    • updateAshEmitter

      public void updateAshEmitter(int level)
      Starts or stops the ash particle emitter based on the current level's tier. Only updates if the tier has changed since the last call.
      Parameters:
      level - the current game level
